<ApiDeprecations deprecations={[{"id":"c164089c-9412-4724-acf6-caf3b0d2a527","type":"endpoint","name":"POST /api/index/v1/getdocumentcount","message":"Endpoint is deprecated","introduced":"2026-02-03","removal":"2026-10-15"}]} />


Fetches document count for the specified custom datasource.

Tip: Use [/debug/\{datasource\}/status](https://developers.glean.com/indexing/debugging/datasource-status) for richer information.
